ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor or teaching assistant overseeing the team */,
  "team_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the team formation began */,
  "team_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the team completed the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the student belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the student within the team */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating category */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the rating category */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is mandatory for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being evaluated */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating received by the student */,
  "diff" REAL /* Difference in ratings */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was finalized */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor or teaching assistant */,
  "student_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the student */,
  "team_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the team */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score after considering all ratings and feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
